I'll start by following the session protocol.

```bash
cd "D:\Proton Drive\My files\Documents\Professional\Programming\Web Development\system.knowledgebase" && git fetch origin main && git merge origin/main --no-edit
```

```bash
git log -3
```

```bash
ls tasks/*.md 2>/dev/null || echo "No task files found"
```

I see there are no active task files, and the recent commits show PageHeader layout fixes and project dropdown improvements have been completed and archived.

How can I help you today? I'm ready to assist with any work on the Neuman Brain project - whether that's planning new features, debugging issues, exploring the codebase, or implementing changes.
